nl_query: For each published result, show the script URN, student name, final marks, computation rule, the list of source attempt types used, the evaluator names for those attempts, and whether the result has been reconciled with ERP.
failed_sql: SELECT r.script_id, sc.student_id, sc.display_name AS student_name, r.final_marks, r.computation_rule, ARRAY(SELECT ea.attempt_type FROM evaluation_attempt ea WHERE ea.script_id = r.script_id AND ea.is_active = TRUE) AS source_attempt_types, ARRAY(SELECT au.display_name FROM app_user au JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id WHERE ea.script_id = r.script_id AND ea.is_active = TRUE) AS evaluator_names, CASE WHEN r.erp_push_status = 'RECONCILED' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS erp_reconciled FROM result r JOIN answer_script sc ON r.script_id = sc.id WHERE r.erp_push_status <> 'RECONCILED'
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.display_name. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
